name: 沈睿

appearance.face: 孩童时清秀聪慧，后成年俊朗如父
appearance.distinguishing_features: 神童聪慧眼神与病弱时哀求表情

visual_reference: Genius young Chinese boy age 7-15 in memory, delicate intelligent face with wise eyes like father, slender build, black hair in child bun, wearing light blue scholar robe, pleading expression, ancient Chinese setting, highly detailed masterpiece
personality: 天生神童、孝顺懂事、劝父母和好
arc: 起点：前世劝父母和好 → 转变：梦中托梦 → 终点：作为女主重生动机
scene_presence: 前世回忆、梦中出现、标题提及

relationships.dynamic: 母子深情，女主重生核心动力
